text:
care. The treating physician orders a continuation of skilled care for a 
subsequent 60-day certification period, at a frequency of one visit every 2 weeks to 
perform observation and assessment of the patient’s skin ulcers to make certain that they 
are not worsening. This order is reasonable and necessary because, although the 
unskilled family caregiver has learned to care for the wounds, the skilled nurse can use 
observation and assessment to determine if the condition is worsening.
